name: Urchin
description: You grew up in the merciless streets of a large city.

name: Wanted
description: There's a price on your head, but you have allies.

name: Cult Initiate
description: You know blasphemous secrets and rituals.

name: Thieves' Guild
description: You have connections, contacts, and debts.

name: Banished
description: Your people cast you out for supposed crimes.

name: Orphaned
description: An unusual guardian rescued and raised you.

name: Wizard's Apprentice
description: You have a knack and eye for magic.

name: Jeweler
description: You can easily appraise value and authenticity.

name: Herbalist
description: You know plants, medicines, and poisons.

name: Barbarian
description: You left the horde, but it never quite left you.

name: Mercenary
description: You fought friend and foe alike for your coin.

name: Sailor
description: Pirate, privateer, or merchant — the seas are yours.

name: Acolyte
description: You're well trained in religious rites and doctrines.

name: Soldier
description: You served as a fighter in an organized army.

name: Ranger
description: The woods and wilds are your true home.

name: Scout
description: You survived on stealth, observation, and speed.

name: Minstrel
description: You've traveled far with your charm and talent.

name: Scholar
description: You know much about ancient history and lore.

name: Noble
description: A famous name has opened many doors for you.

name: Chirurgeon
description: You know anatomy, surgery, and first aid.

name: Farm Hand
description: You worked a tenant farm until the land — or the lord — drove you away.

name: Guild Apprentice
description: You spent years under a craftsman's thumb — smithing, tanning, or carpentry — until wanderlust won.

name: Soldier's Brat
description: You grew up in a military camp, trailing a soldier parent through campaigns and border skirmishes.

name: Church Acolyte
description: You served in a temple, learning doctrine, ritual, and the quiet politics of the faithful.

name: Caravan Guard
description: You walked the merchant roads between cities, keeping bandits and worse at bay.

name: Ley Line Child
description: You grew up near a nexus point. You have always felt the pull of places where power gathers.

name: Frontier Trapper
description: You worked the wild borders of civilization, trapping animals and trading their pelts in rough outpost towns.

name: Noble's Servant
description: You served in a lord's household as a page, stable hand, or domestic. You know how the powerful live.

name: Dockworker
description: You loaded ships at a busy port and heard tales from every corner of the known world.

name: Monster Hunter's Apprentice
description: You assisted an experienced hunter who tracked supernatural threats for pay. You saw things you can't unsee.

name: Travelling Entertainer
description: You traveled with a troupe of bards and acrobats, performing for coins and sleeping in haystacks.

name: War Orphan
description: A bandit raid, a lord's feud, or a monster attack took your family. You survived by learning to be hard.

name: River Boatman
description: You worked the inland waterways as a boatman, knowing every current, ford, and river-town secret.

name: Hedge Wizard's Helper
description: You ran errands for a minor magic user and witnessed enough low-level sorcery to lose your fear of it.

name: Mine Worker
description: You worked the deep mines — stone dust in your lungs and darkness your constant companion.

name: Healer's Assistant
description: You assisted a village herbalist or apothecary, learning to treat wounds, illness, and the occasional curse.

name: Conscript
description: A lord pressed you into service for a season's campaign. You mustered out alive, which is more than most.

name: Merchant's Child
description: You grew up behind a shop counter or on a trading wagon, always moving, always counting coins.

name: Wilderness Hermit
description: You lived far from civilization, self-sufficient and slow to trust anyone who didn't grow their own food.

name: Pit Fighter
description: You fought in the underground pits of a corrupt city. You survived on skill, luck, and pure stubbornness.
